title: My Work Improvement
excerpt: Could you please add a customize option to make possible to select a status to view at My Work. At the moment, Done status can be Hidden so would be appreciated if other status can be Hidden too or to select which status…

posts.author: Mariana (Mariana)
posts.cookedHtml: Could you please add a customize option to make possible to select a status to view at My Work. At the moment, Done status can be Hidden so would be appreciated if other status can be Hidden too or to select which status you want to view as there is a limit on the items that can be viewed on My Work and some status and their items are irrelevant for everyday work. For us for example, we want only to be able to see the Ready to Action items so we know what needs to be actioned. We definitely do not need to see Blank status or any other status created.
